channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Hurricane Milton forces NFL, NHL and other sporting events to adjust game plans
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers are planning to relocate to the New Orleans area to prepare for Sunday’s game against the Saints with Hurricane Milton expected to make landfall along Florida’s west coast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: IndyCar partners with Dallas Cowboys and Texas Rangers for 2026 street race in Arlington
item.description: IndyCar will return to Texas in 2026 with a street race in Arlington in a joint venture between the Dallas Cowboys and the official events partner of the Texas Rangers.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Flyers' Matvei Michkov leads the latest infusion of Russian talent into the NHL
item.description: Matvei Michkov is in the NHL ahead of schedule after the Philadelphia Flyers got him out of Russia and to North America a little over a year after taking him with the seventh pick in the draft.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Monday Morning Lights: Our midseason honors, from players of year to games of year
item.description: Bay Area News Group unveils its midseason recognition. Plus, Miramonte's backup QB overcomes nerves, leads Matadors to win; Heritage aiming for school history; Christopher's star QB does more than pass.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, Nathan Canilao, Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Tossed balls from stands, apparently aimed at Profar, interrupt Padres' win in NLDS Game 2
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Tempers flared on the field and in the stands at Dodger Stadium, with rowdy fans tossing baseballs, apparently at San Diego left fielder Jurickson Profar, and then trash that caused a 12-minute wait between pitches during the seventh inning of the Padres' 10-2 win in NL Division S
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bay Area woman completes water bike ride to Farallones
item.description: Jessica Schiller pedaled to the archipelago in honor of her daughter Naomi, who died from a fentanyl overdose in 2022.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Macdonald, The Mercury News

item.title: Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers arrested on assault, drug possession charges
item.description: New England Patriots safety and team captain Jabrill Peppers was arrested early Saturday morning on assault and drug possession charges, police announced on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Charleston's Chris Mack has fiery message for 'dumb---es' after getting criticized over post about daughter
item.description: College of Charleston coach Chris Mack tore into critics who took shots at him on social media for a post about his daughter's whereabouts during a major college football upset.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Castellanos wins Game 2 for Phillies with 9th-inning single, top Mets 7-6
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Nick Castellanos sometimes amazes himself with intuition he can win a game on the final swing.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What is rhabdo? How intense workouts could seriously hurt you
item.description: A dozen Tufts University men’s lacrosse players were diagnosed with the rare muscle injury in September.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Phillies' Nick Castellanos delivers walk-off hit to defeat Mets in NLDS Game 2
item.description: The Philadelphia Phillies delivered the heroics in Game 2 of the National League Division Series against the New York Mets on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Once Tigers teammates, now close friends, Skubal and Boyd to square off in Game 2 of ALDS
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — On his way to becoming one of baseball's best pitchers, Detroit's unquestioned ace and the AL's next Cy Young Award winner, Tarik Skubal crossed paths with a veteran pitcher — another lefty — who took him under his wing. On Monday, Skubal will intersect with Matthew Boyd again.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aggies get run over by Boise State, 62-30
item.description: BOISE (ABC4 Sports) - Ashton Jeanty ran for 186 yards and three touchdowns on 13 first-half carries, while former American Fork High School quarterback Maddux Madsen passed for 256 yards and three TDs and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: PHOTOS: Padres and Dodgers face off in game 1 of the NLDS
item.description: The San Diego Padres are continuing their postseason journey in game one of the NLDS against the Dodgers after defeating the Braves earlier this week in the NL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Mets use another October rally to score 5 runs in 8th and top Phillies 6-2 in Game 1 of NLDS
item.description: Mark Vientos and Brandon Nimmo keyed another late New York comeback, helping the Mets break through for five runs in the eighth inning against a pair of All-Star relievers as they rallied past the Philadelphia Phillies 6-2 on Saturday in Game 1 of their National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Greg Landry, former Detroit Lions quarterback and assistant coach, dead at 77
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Greg Landry, the former Detroit Lions quarterback and assistant coach, has died. He was 77. The Lions announced Landry's death on social media Friday. No cause of death was given.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz counting on Hendricks and George to take big strides
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With its commitment to a youth movement, the Utah Jazz are counting on Keyonte George and Taylor Hendricks to both take big strides in their second seasons this year. After playing in 75 games as a rookie, George wore down a bit at the end of the year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fans set to camp out for Cal Bears big game
item.description: (KRON) – It will be a busy weekend for the City of Berkeley as the Cal Bears football team is hosting a college game day show for the first time in over 30 years. The Bears are currently (3-1) and are looking to knock off the eighth-seed and undefeated Miami Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Indiana Fever star Caitlin Clark a near-unanimous choice as WNBA's Rookie of the Year
item.description: NEW YORK (AP/WGN) — Caitlin Clark has been named the WNBA Rookie of the Year in a near-unanimous vote, giving the Indiana Fever back-to-back winners after Aliyah Boston won the honor last season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Are professional athletes playing too many games?
item.description: Fans, athletes and medical experts have been having discussions on the increasing demand for players starting from the time they first start playing, all the way up to the professional ranks.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, Fox 5

item.title: Column: Lightning and thunder combo could bode well for Bears' offense
item.description: The Chicago Bears have developed a formidable 1-2 punch in running backs D'Andre Swift and Roschon Johnson, who have shown the ability to both smash and slice through defenses, but the success of the offense depends on the performance of the offensive line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
